name: AstraZeneca PLC
name_former: Astra AB and Zeneca Group PLC
description: AstraZeneca PLC is a global, science-led biopharmaceutical company that focuses on the discovery, development, and commercialization of prescription medicines. The company primarily operates in therapeutic areas including Oncology, Rare Diseases, Cardiovascular, Renal & Metabolism, and Respiratory & Immunology. Headquartered in Cambridge, United Kingdom, AstraZeneca serves patients worldwide by translating science into life-changing medicines.
